message:
fix(hooks): add DepsPresenceMismatch violation for dependency array toggling

Add a new HookRuleViolation::DepsPresenceMismatch variant to distinguish
between dependency arrays changing length (DepsLengthMismatch) vs
appearing/disappearing entirely between renders. Previously, a hook
switching from deps=None to deps=Some([]) was incorrectly classified
as a length mismatch (0 vs 0) which was confusing and lost the actual
violation semantics.

- Add DepsPresenceMismatch { previous_present, current_present } variant
- Route presence mismatches to the new variant instead of DepsLengthMismatch
- Map DepsPresenceMismatch to DependencyShapeDrift in classify_unsupported_semantics
- Add test: validate_consistency_deps_presence_mismatch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
